mapper.sql: select id, code, parent_id, name, alias, path, source, sort, category, action, is_open, remark, is_deleted
mapper.select: select id, code, parent_id, name, alias, path, source, sort, category, action, is_open, is_component, remark, is_deleted, component, component_type, remote_url, cache_version, tenant_id, source_menu_id from blade_menu where is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY tenant_id, sort

SELECT menu.id, menu.code, menu.parent_id, menu.name, menu.alias, menu.path, menu.source, menu.sort, menu.category, menu.action, menu.is_open, menu.remark, menu.is_deleted, menu.tenant_id, ( SELECT CASE WHEN count( 1 ) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM blade_menu WHERE parent_id = menu.id AND is_deleted = 0 AND category = 1 ) AS "has_children" FROM blade_menu menu WHERE menu.is_deleted = 0 AND menu.category = 1
and menu.parent_id = #{param1}
and menu.name like concat(concat('%', #{param2.name}),'%')
and menu.code like concat(concat('%', #{param2.code}),'%')
and menu.alias like concat(concat('%', #{param2.alias}),'%')
ORDER BY menu.tenant_id, menu.sort
select id, parent_id, name as title, id as 'value', id as 'key' from blade_menu where is_deleted = 0 and category = 1 ORDER BY tenant_id, sort

select id, code, parent_id, name, alias, path, source, sort, category, action, is_open, is_component, remark, is_deleted, component, component_type, remote_url, cache_version, tenant_id, source_menu_id from blade_menu where is_deleted = 0 and category = 1 ORDER BY tenant_id, sort

SELECT id, code, parent_id, name, alias, path, source, sort, category, action, is_open, is_component, remark, is_deleted, component, component_type, remote_url, cache_version, tenant_id, source_menu_id FROM blade_menu WHERE is_deleted = 0 and category = 1
and id IN ( SELECT menu_id FROM blade_role_menu WHERE role_id IN
#{item} )
and 1 = 0

select.if: SELECT id, parent_id, `code`, `name`, alias, path, source, action, sort, category, is_component FROM blade_menu WHERE 1 = 0

mapper.select: select id, parent_id, name as title, id as 'value', id as 'key' from blade_menu where is_deleted = 0 and tenant_id = #{tenantId}

select.if: select id, parent_id, name as title, id as 'value', id as 'key' from blade_menu where 1 = 0

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT id, parent_id, NAME AS title, id AS "value", id AS "key" FROM blade_menu WHERE category = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id IN ( SELECT menu_id FROM blade_scope_data WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND menu_id IS NOT NULL ) ) menu
UNION ALL
SELECT id, menu_id AS parent_id, scope_name AS title, id AS "value", id AS "key" FROM blade_scope_data WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND menu_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT id, parent_id, NAME AS title, id AS "value", id AS "key" FROM blade_menu WHERE category = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id IN ( SELECT menu_id FROM blade_scope_api WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND menu_id IS NOT NULL ) ) menu
UNION ALL
SELECT id, menu_id AS parent_id, scope_name AS title, id AS "value", id AS "key" FROM blade_scope_api WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND menu_id IS NOT NULL

select.if: SELECT id, parent_id, name as title, id as 'value', id as 'key' from blade_menu where 1 = 0
SELECT id, parent_id, name as title, id as 'value', id as 'key' from blade_menu where 1 = 0
SELECT '' as alias, '' as path WHERE 1 = 0

mapper.select: SELECT id, code, parent_id, name, alias, path, source, sort, category, action, is_open, is_component, remark, is_deleted, component, component_type, remote_url, cache_version, tenant_id, source_menu_id FROM blade_menu WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN ( SELECT menu_id FROM blade_top_menu_setting WHERE top_menu_id = #{topMenuId} )
select id, parent_id, name as title, id as "value", id as "key" from blade_menu where category = 1 and is_deleted = 0 and tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by sort

select.if: select id, parent_id, name as title, id as "value", id as "key" from blade_menu where 1 = 0
